# Automatic Data Analysis

An intelligent, interactive data analysis dashboard built using **Streamlit** that allows users to upload datasets, generate insights, visualize data, and interact with it using natural language.

---

## 📌 Project Overview

This project is an **AI-powered data analysis tool** that simplifies data exploration and visualization. Users can upload CSV files and instantly get:

* 📊 Interactive charts
* 🧠 Auto-generated insights
* 🔍 Dynamic filtering
* 🤖 Chat with data
* 🔮 Basic predictions

---

## ✨ Features

### 📂 1. Upload & Analyze Data

* Upload any CSV file
* Automatic data analysis (rows, columns, missing values)

### 📊 2. Interactive Visualizations

* Bar charts
* Histogram
* Pie charts
* Donut charts

### 🤖 3. Chat with Your Data

* Ask questions like:

  * “Average values?”
  * “Top records?”
  * “Sum of data?”

### 🔍 4. Smart Filters

* Dynamic filtering based on categorical columns

### 🧹 5. Data Cleaning

* Remove duplicates
* Fill missing values

### 🧠 6. Auto Insights

* Most frequent values
* Data summary

### 🔮 7. Prediction

* Simple prediction using mean values

### 📂 8. Compare Multiple Files

* Upload and compare two datasets

### 📥 9. Export Options

* Download processed dataset

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

* Python 🐍
* Streamlit
* Pandas
* NumPy
* Plotly

---

## ⚙️ Installation & Setup

### 1️⃣ Clone the repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/priashapatle/Automatic-Data-Analysis.git
cd ai-data-analyst-dashboard
```

### 2️⃣ Install dependencies

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

### 3️⃣ Run the app

```bash
streamlit run dashboard.py
```
